hook.summary: Two anime-style female protagonists on a weaponized motorcycle confront a massive zombie horde on a bridge.
hook.visual_action: A pink motorcycle with mounted guns stops in front of a crowd of zombies while the characters exchange dialogue.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Looks like a dead end. Just a traffic jam. Clear it.

scene_flow: Two female protagonists on a pink motorcycle face a massive zombie horde on a bridge.
One character jumps off to slice through zombies with a katana while the bike speeds ahead.
The motorcycle drives up a truck ramp to launch into the air.
The bike fires mounted machine guns at the zombies below during a slow-motion jump.
The characters land safely as the game title and call to action appear.
audience_proxy: Young male gamers who enjoy anime aesthetics and high-octane zombie survival action.
